languages.text: {n}Последнее, что вы успеваете расслышать — отвратительный влажный хруст, с которым игла пробивает ваши кости и пронзает мозг. Наступает темнота.{/n}
{n}The last thing you hear is the repulsive, wet crunch as the needle pierces through your bones and into your brain. Darkness engulfs you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Последнее, что вы успеваете расслышать — отвратительный влажный хруст, с которым игла пробивает ваши кости и пронзает мозг. Наступает темнота.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The last thing you hear is the repulsive, wet crunch as the needle pierces through your bones and into your brain. Darkness engulfs you.{/n}
{n}The last thing you hear is the repulsive, wet crunch as the needle pierces through your bones and into your brain. Darkness engulfs you.{/n}
{n}The last thing you hear is the repulsive, wet crunch as the needle pierces through your bones and into your brain. Darkness engulfs you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lo último que oyes es el crujido vomitivo y húmedo de la aguja atravesando tus huesos y tu cerebro. La oscuridad te devora.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The last thing you hear is the repulsive, wet crunch as the needle pierces through your bones and into your brain. Darkness engulfs you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Lo último que oyes es el crujido vomitivo y húmedo de la aguja atravesando tus huesos y tu cerebro. La oscuridad te devora.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你最后听到的，是那根毒针碾碎骨头、钻入大脑时，令人作呕的湿腻嘎吱声。随后黑暗将你彻底吞没。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The last thing you hear is the repulsive, wet crunch as the needle pierces through your bones and into your brain. Darkness engulfs you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你最后听到的，是那根毒针碾碎骨头、钻入大脑时，令人作呕的湿腻嘎吱声。随后黑暗将你彻底吞没。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La dernière chose que vous entendez n'est autre qu'un craquement écœurant suivi d'un bruit de succion tandis que l'aiguille transperce vos os avant de s'enfoncer dans votre cervelle, après quoi les ténèbres vous engloutissent.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The last thing you hear is the repulsive, wet crunch as the needle pierces through your bones and into your brain. Darkness engulfs you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La dernière chose que vous entendez n'est autre qu'un craquement écœurant suivi d'un bruit de succion tandis que l'aiguille transperce vos os avant de s'enfoncer dans votre cervelle, après quoi les ténèbres vous engloutissent.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Duyduğun son şey, iğnenin kemiklerini delip beynine girerken çıkardığı iğrenç, ıslak çatırtı oluyor. Karanlık seni yutuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The last thing you hear is the repulsive, wet crunch as the needle pierces through your bones and into your brain. Darkness engulfs you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Duyduğun son şey, iğnenin kemiklerini delip beynine girerken çıkardığı iğrenç, ıslak çatırtı oluyor. Karanlık seni yutuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Letzte, was du hörst, ist das widerliche feuchte Knirschen, als die Nadel deine Knochen durchbohrt und in dein Gehirn eindringt. Dunkelheit umgibt dich.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The last thing you hear is the repulsive, wet crunch as the needle pierces through your bones and into your brain. Darkness engulfs you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Letzte, was du hörst, ist das widerliche feuchte Knirschen, als die Nadel deine Knochen durchbohrt und in dein Gehirn eindringt. Dunkelheit umgibt dich.{/n}

languages.text: {n}最後の聞くものは、針が骨を突き破って脳に刺さる、不快な湿った音がする。暗闇があなたを包む。{/n}
